rules: Enemies adjacent lose Echo eligibility and −10 Attack — too soothed to rage

name: The Surer Tide
rules: Steadfast; at your Flow, every adjacent ally heals 20 — the calm spreads, in no hurry

name: The Drowning Tide
rules: Arcane; on arrival, deal 20 to one enemy in reach — the same patient water, closing over your mouth

name: The Widening Absence
rules: Enemies adjacent get −20 Defense — the board gives way further

name: The Long Erasure
rules: Arcane; on arrival, eat one enemy impression on the board (it is forgotten — the Solace banks the erasure) — the hunger sharpened

name: The Grudge Entire
rules: +10 Attack for each enemy impression on the board; Retaliates +20 — the count, made teeth

name: The Grudge Forgiven
rules: On arrival: release every adjacent fading spirit (no impression) — it set the ledger down; it is at peace, which is the unbearable part

name: The Gnawing Unending
rules: Relentless · Arcane; on arrival, deal 10 to all adjacent enemies — a deliberate scouring

name: The Gnawing Stilled
rules: Enemies adjacent lose Echo eligibility and −10 Attack — the hunger, finally quiet; it asks the room to rest

name: Spite, Made Whole
rules: Relentless; on arrival, deal 20 to one enemy in reach — it cannot win, but it will not let you win clean

name: Dog Who Knows the Way Home
rules: Gentle. escorts the furthest-from-home

name: Cat From Three Houses Down
rules: Gentle. you join the rotation

name: Pigeon Carrying a Message Never Delivered
rules: Gentle. Mobile; the message is for whoever befriends it

name: Duckling Following Anyone
rules: Gentle. Mobile; ALL Imprints count as shared

name: Tortoise Outliving the Garden
rules: Gentle. Steadfast

name: Goat on the Roof
rules: Gentle. surfaces on any empty inner tile, including ones you'd swear it couldn't

name: Bee Far From the Hive
rules: Gentle. Mobile; Parting: adjacent spirit +10 Attack this round

name: Foal Born During the Storm
rules: Gentle. at its controller's Flow: +5/+5 (max +20/+20) — it grows up with you

name: Home, Who Was a Dog Once
rules: Gentle. it befriends the trailing Narrator

name: Crow Counting Strangers
rules: Wary. it remembers every kindness, exactly

name: Hare at the Edge of the Field
rules: Wary. Mobile

name: Heron Who Hates Being Looked At
rules: Wary. —

name: Mule Who's Been Promised Things Before
rules: Wary. Steadfast; evidence-only policy

name: Moth Around Someone Else's Lamp
rules: Wary. Mobile; it chose a different lamp; it could be persuaded

name: Vixen Reading Your Tracks
rules: Wary. while unclaimed, face-downs adjacent to her are revealed to both players

name: Badger Mid-Eviction
rules: Wary. retaliates +10

name: Stag Who Survived the Painting of Him
rules: Wary. he has seen what Narrators do

name: Hundredname, Who Has Been Watching
rules: Wary. nine turns of trust, at most three per encounter, persisting across matches

name: Burr
rules: Feral. a hedgehog-shaped objection

name: Stray Spark
rules: Feral. a campfire's escaped ember, gone wild

name: Gull Who Owns the Pier
rules: Feral. it will fight you for chips; it will win

name: Dog Who Was Left
rules: Feral. the mirror

name: Weasel in the Walls
rules: Feral. Mobile

name: Boar of the Burnt Orchard
rules: Feral. —

name: Owl That Answers No One
rules: Feral. —

name: Wolverine Wearing a Trap
rules: Feral. Steadfast, retaliates +10; befriending removes the trap

name: Ashmane, Who Outran the Ill Intent
rules: [signature reach: ✶Hunt] Feral. the hardest catch in the game

name: Emberkit
rules: Glimpse  on arrival: look at your top 2, take 1

name: The Long Coronation
rules: Momentum chains give +10 Attack

name: Pebble-Underfoot
rules: Steadfast

name: The Mountain Remembers
rules: Steadfast

name: Rillsong Tadpole
rules: On arrival: a fading ally recovers 10

name: The Sky's Whole Weight
rules: On arrival: allied Reach +1 this round (targeting only)
